_meta.name: English
_meta._comment: Template file. Copy to <code>.json and translate the right-hand side. Keys (left side) must NOT be changed — they are matched against source strings in voxfox.py.

OCR: open a PDF or image and read the te: OCR: open a PDF or image and read the text aloud
Select a screen region and read its text: Select a screen region and read its text aloud via OCR
Dictate: record speech and type it: Dictate: record speech and type it
OCR Python packages failed to install: OCR Python packages failed to install
Open a PDF or image to read via OCR: Open a PDF or image to read via OCR
Piper TTS is not installed yet.
Read UI text under the mouse pointer alo: Read UI text under the mouse pointer aloud (AT-SPI)
Select a screen region to read via OCR: Select a screen region to read via OCR
Set a URL and model first: Set a URL and model first
gsettings not found (not a GNOME session: gsettings not found (not a GNOME session?)
Rules for slot 1's language (%s). Words: Rules for slot 1's language (%s). Words are matched whole and case-insensitively, then re-spelled before they are spoken.
Accessibility enabled. Restart apps (and: Accessibility enabled. Restart apps (and use --force-renderer-accessibility for Chromium) to apply.
Auto uses an NVIDIA GPU when detected (n: Auto uses an NVIDIA GPU when detected (needs CUDA + cuDNN), otherwise the CPU. Falls back to CPU if GPU init fails.
Commands you can bind to keyboard shortc: Commands you can bind to keyboard shortcuts:
No screenshot tool found (install gnome-: No screenshot tool found (install gnome-screenshot, spectacle, scrot, or grim+slurp)
OCR via the tesseract CLI failed. Check: OCR via the tesseract CLI failed. Check that tesseract-ocr and the language packs are installed.
Scanned PDF — running OCR (this can take: Scanned PDF — running OCR (this can take a while)...
Tesseract OCR not found. Install it with: Tesseract OCR not found. Install it with: sudo apt install tesseract-ocr
pdftoppm not found. Install it with: sud: pdftoppm not found. Install it with: sudo apt install poppler-utils
When reading OCR or selected text, join: When reading OCR or selected text, join lines that are only word-wrapped and pause only at real paragraphs. Turn off to read every line separately (lists, code).
Click a shortcut and press the key combi: Click a shortcut and press the key combination you want. Then choose Install shortcuts to register them with your desktop. Nothing is installed automatically.
Shortcuts installed. You can change or r: Shortcuts installed. You can change or remove them in your system keyboard settings.
Could not install shortcuts on this desk: Could not install shortcuts on this desktop. Your desktop may use a different method — set them manually in its keyboard settings.
That key combination is already used by: That key combination is already used by another VoxFox shortcut.
Shortcuts installed. The desktop was rel: Shortcuts installed. The desktop was reloaded to activate them.
Add --force-renderer-accessibility to th: Add --force-renderer-accessibility to the browser's desktop file or launcher to enable hover reading in web pages.
Add this flag to the browser launcher to: Add this flag to the browser launcher to enable hover reading in web pages.
Could not grab the screen for selection: Could not grab the screen for selection
Default keyboard shortcuts — change them: Default keyboard shortcuts — change them in Settings → Shortcuts:
A few steps get VoxFox ready. You only n: A few steps get VoxFox ready. You only need to do these once; come back here any time from the menu.
Downloads Piper, the default voices, dic: Downloads Piper, the default voices, dictation (faster-whisper) and the OCR helpers. Needs an internet connection.
For OCR in other languages, install the: For OCR in other languages, install the matching Tesseract pack, e.g. sudo apt install tesseract-ocr-nld
Lets VoxFox read text in other apps and: Lets VoxFox read text in other apps and power hover reading. Restart those apps afterwards.
Accessibility bus unavailable — hover re: Accessibility bus unavailable — hover reading can't start. Enable accessibility, then log out and back in.
Use AI (Ollama) to clean up the page tex: Use AI (Ollama) to clean up the page text
No web page found — focus a browser tab: No web page found — focus a browser tab and make sure accessibility is on (Chromium needs --force-renderer-accessibility)
Ollama not reachable — reading the unfil: Ollama not reachable — reading the unfiltered text
Nothing left to read after filtering: Nothing left to read after filtering
Requires a running Ollama with a downloa: Requires a running Ollama with a downloaded model, e.g.: ollama pull llama3.2
Registers the six VoxFox shortcuts on yo: Registers the six VoxFox shortcuts on your desktop. Change the keys first under Settings → Shortcuts if you like.
Reads a web page aloud (experimental). S: Reads a web page aloud (experimental). Select the page's address (Ctrl+L in the browser) and press the shortcut — VoxFox fetches the page itself. Menus, banners and sidebars are always skipped; optionally an AI (Ollama) filters the remaining text further or summarizes it.
Could not fetch a readable page from the: Could not fetch a readable page from the selected address
Select the page's address first (Ctrl+L: Select the page's address first (Ctrl+L in the browser), then press the shortcut again
Opening the page in a background browser: Opening the page in a background browser...
Not a valid VoxFox dictionary file: Not a valid VoxFox dictionary file
Export your dictionary to share it, or i: Export your dictionary to share it, or import one from another user or from voxfox.nl.
Review the text before it is typed:: Review the text before it is typed:
Previous microphone not found — using th: Previous microphone not found — using the default
Transcription copied — press Ctrl+V to p: Transcription copied — press Ctrl+V to paste
Review the text, then copy it and paste: Review the text, then copy it and paste with Ctrl+V:
Falling behind — a sentence was skipped: Falling behind — a sentence was skipped
How easily speech is detected. High suit: How easily speech is detected. High suits quiet laptop microphones.
